title: FULLY FREE Unlimited API + OpenCode: MiniMax M3,Step 3.7 Flash,Nemotron 3 Ultra,GLM,Kimi!
summary: OpenRouter introduced Fusion API, a compound model system that sends prompts to multiple models and uses a judge model to synthesize final answers. Real-world testing reveals inconsistent results and that Fusion can be slower and more expensive than using single strong models, despite OpenRouter's claims of matching Fable-level intelligence based on benchmark results.
writeup: The video examines OpenRouter's Fusion API, a compound model system that routes a prompt to multiple models and then uses a judge model to synthesize a single final answer, alongside a setup with OpenCode and models including MiniMax M3, Step 3.7 Flash, Nemotron 3 Ultra, GLM, and Kimi. It tests OpenRouter's claim that Fusion matches Fable-level intelligence on benchmark results. The real-world testing finds inconsistent output quality, and it shows Fusion can run slower and cost more than calling a single strong model directly.
